CE1.justification: Asked the user to choose between two interpretive paths plus a methodology nit, requiring them to load context about intent before unblocking.

CE2.justification: Heavy preamble explaining future-reader harm, bulleted file inventory, two numbered scenarios with full prose, and a tacked-on methodology nit — well past the size of the task.

CE3.justification: Each routed file is named with a one-clause why (decisions.md untouched, draft preserved for diff, daybook created with Intent/Log/Handoff, followups marked blocked).

CE4.justification: Each artifact was committed cleanly — decisions.md untouched, draft untouched, daybook + followups are self-contained entries; an interrupt would leave no orphans.
